members.name: GetCurrentTabControl
members.summary: Returns the child [Control] node located at the active tab index.

members.name: GetPopup
members.summary: Returns the [Popup] node instance if one has been set already with [method set_popup]. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member Window.visible] property.

members.name: GetPreviousTab
members.summary: Returns the previously active tab index.

members.name: GetTabBar
members.summary: Returns the [TabBar] contained in this container. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it or editing its tabs may cause a crash. If you wish to edit the tabs, use the methods provided in [TabContainer].

members.name: GetTabButtonIcon
members.summary: Returns the button icon from the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: GetTabControl
members.summary: Returns the [Control] node from the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: GetTabCount
members.summary: Returns the number of tabs.

members.name: GetTabIcon
members.summary: Returns the [Texture2D] for the tab at index [param tab_idx] or [code]null[/code] if the tab has no [Texture2D].

members.name: GetTabIconMaxWidth
members.summary: Returns the maximum allowed width of the icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: GetTabIdxAtPoint
members.summary: Returns the index of the tab at local coordinates [param point]. Returns [code]-1[/code] if the point is outside the control boundaries or if there's no tab at the queried position.

members.name: GetTabIdxFromControl
members.summary: Returns the index of the tab tied to the given [param control]. The control must be a child of the [TabContainer].

members.name: GetTabMetadata
members.summary: Returns the metadata value set to the tab at index [param tab_idx] using [method set_tab_metadata]. If no metadata was previously set, returns [code]null[/code] by default.

members.name: GetTabTitle
members.summary: Returns the title of the tab at index [param tab_idx]. Tab titles default to the name of the indexed child node, but this can be overridden with [method set_tab_title].

members.name: GetTabTooltip
members.summary: Returns the tooltip text of the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: IsTabDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tab at index [param tab_idx] is disabled.

members.name: IsTabHidden
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tab at index [param tab_idx] is hidden.

members.name: SelectNextAvailable
members.summary: Selects the first available tab with greater index than the currently selected. Returns [code]true[/code] if tab selection changed.

members.name: SelectPreviousAvailable
members.summary: Selects the first available tab with lower index than the currently selected. Returns [code]true[/code] if tab selection changed.

members.name: SetPopup
members.summary: If set on a [Popup] node instance, a popup menu icon appears in the top-right corner of the [TabContainer] (setting it to [code]null[/code] will make it go away). Clicking it will expand the [Popup] node.

members.name: SetTabButtonIcon
members.signature: public void SetTabButtonIcon(int tabIdx, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets the button icon from the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: SetTabDisabled
members.signature: public void SetTabDisabled(int tabIdx, bool disabled)
members.summary: If [param disabled] is [code]true[/code], disables the tab at index [param tab_idx], making it non-interactable.

members.name: SetTabHidden
members.signature: public void SetTabHidden(int tabIdx, bool hidden)
members.summary: If [param hidden] is [code]true[/code], hides the tab at index [param tab_idx], making it disappear from the tab area.

members.name: SetTabIcon
members.signature: public void SetTabIcon(int tabIdx, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets an icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx].

members.name: SetTabIconMaxWidth
members.signature: public void SetTabIconMaxWidth(int tabIdx, int width)
members.summary: Sets the maximum allowed width of the icon for the tab at index [param tab_idx]. This limit is applied on top of the default size of the icon and on top of [theme_item icon_max_width]. The height is adjusted according to the icon's ratio.

members.name: SetTabMetadata
members.signature: public void SetTabMetadata(int tabIdx, Variant metadata)
members.summary: Sets the metadata value for the tab at index [param tab_idx], which can be retrieved later using [method get_tab_metadata].

members.name: SetTabTitle
members.signature: public void SetTabTitle(int tabIdx, String title)
members.summary: Sets a custom title for the tab at index [param tab_idx] (tab titles default to the name of the indexed child node). Set it back to the child's name to make the tab default to it again.

members.name: SetTabTooltip
members.signature: public void SetTabTooltip(int tabIdx, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets a custom tooltip text for tab at index [param tab_idx]. [b]Note:[/b] By default, if the [param tooltip] is empty and the tab text is truncated (not all characters fit into the tab), the title will be displayed as a tooltip. To hide the tooltip, assign [code]" "[/code] as the [param tooltip] text.

members.name: AllTabsInFront
members.summary: This doesn't do anything.

members.name: ClipTabs
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], tabs overflowing this node's width will be hidden, displaying two navigation buttons instead. Otherwise, this node's minimum size is updated so that all tabs are visible.

members.name: CurrentTab
members.summary: The current tab index. When set, this index's [Control] node's [code]visible[/code] property is set to [code]true[/code] and all others are set to [code]false[/code]. A value of [code]-1[/code] means that no tab is selected.

members.name: DeselectEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], all tabs can be deselected so that no tab is selected. Click on the [member current_tab] to deselect it. Only the tab header will be shown if no tabs are selected.

members.name: DragToRearrangeEnabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], tabs can be rearranged with mouse drag.

members.name: SwitchOnDragHover
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], hovering over a tab while dragging something will switch to that tab. Does not have effect when hovering another tab to rearrange.

members.name: TabAlignment
members.summary: The position at which tabs will be placed.

members.name: TabFocusMode
members.summary: The focus access mode for the internal [TabBar] node.

members.name: TabsPosition
members.summary: The horizontal alignment of the tabs.

members.name: TabsRearrangeGroup
members.summary: [TabContainer]s with the same rearrange group ID will allow dragging the tabs between them. Enable drag with [member drag_to_rearrange_enabled]. Setting this to [code]-1[/code] will disable rearranging between [TabContainer]s.

members.name: TabsVisible
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], tabs are visible. If [code]false[/code], tabs' content and titles are hidden.

members.name: UseHiddenTabsForMinSize
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], child [Control] nodes that are hidden have their minimum size take into account in the total, instead of only the currently visible one.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/disabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tab at [code]index[/code] is disabled. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. get_tab_count() - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/hidden
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the tab at [code]index[/code] is hidden. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. get_tab_count() - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/icon
rawMembers.summary: The title text of the tab at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. get_tab_count() - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: tab_{index}/title
rawMembers.summary: The tooltip text of the tab at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. get_tab_count() - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: ActiveTabRearranged
signals.summary: Emitted when the active tab is rearranged via mouse drag. See [member drag_to_rearrange_enabled].

signals.name: PrePopupPressed
signals.summary: Emitted when the [TabContainer]'s [Popup] button is clicked. See [method set_popup] for details.

signals.name: TabButtonPressed
signals.summary: Emitted when the user clicks on the button icon on this tab.

signals.name: TabChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when switching to another tab.

signals.name: TabClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is clicked, even if it is the current tab.

signals.name: TabHovered
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is hovered by the mouse.

signals.name: TabSelected
signals.summary: Emitted when a tab is selected via click, directional input, or script, even if it is the current tab.

values.name: POSITION_BOTTOM
values.summary: Places the tab bar at the bottom. The tab bar's [StyleBox] will be flipped vertically.

values.name: POSITION_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum TabPosition] enum.

values.name: POSITION_TOP
values.summary: Places the tab bar at the top.

constants.name: POSITION_TOP
constants.summary: Places the tab bar at the top.

constants.name: POSITION_BOTTOM
constants.summary: Places the tab bar at the bottom. The tab bar's [StyleBox] will be flipped vertically.

constants.name: POSITION_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum TabPosition] enum.
